landing.heroSubtitle: Get triaged before you visit the clinic. Save time, get the right care faster.
landing.step1Desc: Chat with our AI assistant about what you're experiencing
landing.step2Desc: Our system assesses the urgency of your symptoms
landing.step3Desc: Get matched with the right time slot based on urgency
landing.feature1Desc: Pre-screen your symptoms any time, day or night
landing.feature2Desc: Based on established clinical triage protocols
landing.feature3Desc: Complete your pre-screening in under 3 minutes

consent.title: Before We Begin
consent.disclaimer: ⚠️ This AI-powered tool assists in pre-screening only and is NOT a diagnostic tool. It does not replace professional medical judgment. All triage classifications are preliminary and subject to clinical review. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 1122 immediately.
consent.checkboxLabel: I understand and agree to proceed with pre-screening
consent.emergencyNote: 🚨 If this is an emergency, please call
consent.privacyNote: Your data is protected. By continuing, you agree to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and <terms>Terms of Service</terms>.

chat.greeting: Hello! I'm MedAssist AI, your pre-screening assistant. I'm here to help understand your symptoms and guide you to the right care. What brings you in today?
chat.disclaimer: This is not a diagnosis. Please consult a healthcare professional.
chat.inputDisabled: Please wait for the assistant to respond...

triage.mildDesc: Your symptoms suggest a non-urgent condition. We recommend scheduling a routine appointment.
triage.urgentDesc: Your symptoms may need prompt attention. We recommend seeing a doctor as soon as possible.
triage.criticalDesc: Your symptoms may indicate a medical emergency. Please seek immediate help.

emergency.title: Please Call Emergency Services Immediately
emergency.subtitle: Based on your symptoms, you should seek emergency medical care right away
emergency.clinicNotified: Your clinic has been notified about your situation
emergency.mentalHealthDesc: Free, confidential mental health support available 24/7
emergency.doNotDismiss: Your safety is our top priority

booking.title: Book Your Appointment
booking.noSlots: No available slots at this time. Please try again later.

confirmation.title: Appointment Confirmed! ✅
confirmation.subtitle: We've sent a confirmation email with all the details

manage.title: Manage Your Appointment
manage.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel?

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you agree to our

footer.disclaimer: MedAssist AI is a pre-screening tool and does not provide medical diagnosis. In case of emergency, call 1122.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for better healthcare in Pakistan

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please start a new pre-screening.
errors.invalidInput: Please check your input and try again.
